products.name: OpenClaw
products.description: 原版龙虾，功能最完整的 AI Agent 开源项目，GitHub 历史星标第一
products.descriptionEn: Original Claw, the most complete AI Agent open-source project, #1 GitHub stars

products.name: NanoClaw
products.description: 轻量级版本，容器安全隔离，适合生产环境，Qwibit.ai 出品
products.descriptionEn: Lightweight version with container isolation, production-ready, by Qwibit.ai

products.name: ZeroClaw
products.description: Rust 极致轻量，3.4MB二进制，<10ms冷启动，<5MB内存占用
products.descriptionEn: Rust ultra-lightweight, 3.4MB binary, <10ms cold start, <5MB memory

products.name: PicoClaw
products.description: Sipeed 出品超轻量 Go 实现，<10MB内存，$10硬件可运行
products.descriptionEn: Ultra-lightweight Go implementation by Sipeed, <10MB memory, runs on $10 hardware

products.name: TinyClaw

products.descriptionEn: Multi-Agent collaboration framework, multi-team/multi-channel support, 24/7 operation

products.name: IronClaw

products.name: 思源笔记

products.descriptionEn: Privacy-first, self-hosted open-source knowledge management, supports chatgpt/ollama/deepseek/openclaw

products.name: CC Switch
